scope: KMU RecSys 26 Steam latest paper and Hugging Face model feasibility scan
gpu_probe: 4x Tesla V100-PCIE-32GB; V100 lacks native BF16 acceleration, so prefer FP16 for large embedding models.

paper_triage.mechanism: review-augmented generative recommendation with item/review semantic IDs and DPO alignment
paper_triage.reason: review text is the only allowed non-adjacency signal; full sequential/generative framing overlaps the rejected SASRec axis
non-gated HF models can encode train reviews reproducibly; no hidden/test data needed
overlaps DNS/hard-negative and top-K objective axes; needs generative/pairwise setup first
top-K objective axis was already approximated by SL@K-lite and rejected; full port likely high cost and graph-CF redundant

paper_triage.mechanism: top-K accuracy optimization under distribution shift
paper_triage.reason: same objective-geometry family after SL@K-lite rejection
project-specific SL@K-lite continuation was negative on all 3 splits

hf_model_triage.probe: train-review user/item semantic profiles + residualized cosine
same review semantic profile, possibly 256-dim truncation
rank K/K+1 boundary reranking using user/game review summaries

recommended_next_step.name: Qwen3 review semantic residual probe
recommended_next_step.strict_gate: fixed 3-split mean delta >= 0.00355, fixes > breaks, paired exact/McNemar support
recommended_next_step.kill_condition: if residualized semantic score is <= 0 or non-sign-stable, close HF text embedding axes
